mapper.select: SELECT id, article_id AS articleId, image_url AS imageUrl, sort_order AS sortOrder, is_cover AS isCover FROM _article_images WHERE article_id = #{id} ORDER BY is_cover DESC, sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT t.id, t.name FROM _article_tags at JOIN _tags t ON t.id = at.tag_id WHERE at.article_id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO _article_likes (user_id, article_id, created_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{articleId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM _article_likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND article_id = #{articleId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM _article_likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND article_id = #{articleId}
